---
name: "Good first issue: Add intervention prompt templates"
about: "Contribute more gentle intervention prompt templates."
title: "Good first issue: Add more intervention prompt templates"
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Add more non-aggressive intervention prompt templates for different scenarios
and severity levels.

## Suggested Scope

- Family, partner communication, education, and child-protection scenarios.
- Low, medium, and high risk levels.
- Prompts should de-escalate, avoid blame, and avoid medical/legal claims.
- Keep wording short enough for TTS playback.

## Acceptance Notes

- Do not frame prompts as surveillance, punishment, diagnosis, or legal
  evidence collection.
- Include Chinese prompts first; English prompt variants are also welcome.
